howItWorks.intro: This iran nuclear timeline estimator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: SWU capacity = centrifuges × SWU per centrifuge per year
Breakout time = remaining SWU needed / annual SWU capacity
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: What is nuclear breakout time?
faq.answer: Breakout time is the estimated period needed to produce enough weapons-grade (90%+) highly enriched uranium for one nuclear weapon, typically about 25 kg. It does not include weaponization — building the actual device.

faq.question: What is the IAEA's role?
faq.answer: The International Atomic Energy Agency conducts inspections and monitoring of Iran's nuclear facilities. Their quarterly reports provide the most authoritative public data on Iran's enrichment activities, stockpile sizes, and centrifuge deployments.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This uses simplified models based on publicly available data. Actual breakout estimates by intelligence agencies factor in classified information about facility hardening, weaponization expertise, and delivery systems that are not publicly known.

faq.question: Is the Iran Nuclear Timeline Estimator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: What current enrichment level should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate current enrichment level value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the Iran Nuclear Timeline Estimator?
sections.body: The Iran Nuclear Timeline Estimator is a free online tool designed for analysts and informed citizens who need quick, accurate calculations in the geopolitics and energy markets space. By entering your current enrichment level, heu stockpile, operating centrifuges, you get instant results including est. breakout time, weapons-grade u needed, enrichment progress. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting est. breakout time right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In geopolitics and energy markets, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by analysts and informed citizens worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to understand global dynamics with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your current enrichment level and need to find the right est. breakout time. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Current Enrichment Level (%)
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your current enrichment level — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: heu stockpile, operating centrifuges, centrifuge generation. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your est. breakout time, weapons-grade u needed, enrichment progress. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your current enrichment level before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
